---
title: "Calibration Diagnostics"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Calibration Diagnostics}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::knitr}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r}
library(ppiAIPW)

set.seed(3)
Y <- rbinom(100, 1, 0.5)
Yhat <- pmin(pmax(0.15 + 0.7 * Y + runif(100, -0.2, 0.2), 0.01), 0.99)
Yhat_unlabeled <- runif(300, 0.01, 0.99)

result <- mean_inference(Y, Yhat, Yhat_unlabeled, method = "linear")
diag_obj <- calibration_diagnostics(result, Y, Yhat)

print(diag_obj)
plot_calibration(diag_obj)
```

Diagnostics are built from the labeled sample and can be computed from either a
fitted `ppi_mean_result` or a reusable calibration model.
